# CIE high-charge-pool tables for C (Z=6, pool q = 2 .. 6)
# Source: ioneq_C.txt + cool_C.txt
# x_high_frac  = sum_{q >= 2} ioneq_q(T)
# q_high_mean  = sum_{q >= 2} q * ioneq_q / x_high_frac  (0 where pool is empty)
# Lambda_high  = sum_{q >= 2} ioneq_q * L_q     [erg cm^3 / s]
# T grid: 121 log-spaced points, 10^3.00 K -> 10^9.00 K
